title: galarhoeus formosanus
intro: Galarhoeus formosanus, also known as Formosan creepers or Formosan milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Taiwan, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Galarhoeus formosanus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve immune function, and protect against cancer. The plant is often prepared for herbal use by drying and processing its roots and rhizomes into teas, infusions, or capsules.
